source: EAEU (Eurasian Economic Union) Common Customs Tariff

system_overview.name: EAEU Common Customs Tariff
system_overview.description: Common tariff system for the Eurasian Economic Union member states

tariff_code_specifications.coverage: All goods subject to customs tariffs in EAEU member states
tariff_code_specifications.harmonization: Unified tariff system across all member states

relevant_departments.name: Department of Customs and Tariff Regulation
relevant_departments.function: Manages EAEU tariff policy and rates

eec_customs_code.description: Unofficial English translation of EAEU Customs Code

bulk_download_capability.documentation: Not explicitly documented in available sources
bulk_download_capability.notes: Database structure exists but download mechanism not clearly publicized

data_availability.scope: Applied tariff rates for all EAEU members
data_availability.uniformity: Common tariff rates across all member states

regulatory_context.coverage: Import/export tariffs, customs procedures, trade preferences

assessment.importance: HIGH - Covers Russia and major Eurasian economies
assessment.accessibility: Limited public documentation on bulk download mechanisms
assessment.recommendation: HIGH PRIORITY - Contact EEC directly at https://eec.eaeunion.org/ for bulk tariff database access; Russia is a major economy
